title: Strong wind and cold weather on Wednesday
description: GARDEN ROUTE | KAROO NEWS - In the latest...
bodyText:
GARDEN ROUTE | KAROO NEWS - In the latest weather update from SA Weather Service, strong wind can be expected today, Wednesday 21 May.

Wet, windy, and cold to very cold conditions over western high-lying areas of the Western Cape and southern parts of the Northern Cape and Free State, with a possibility of light snow along the high-lying mountain tops of Western Cape, Eastern Cape up to the Lesotho until Wednesday.


> Here is what you need to know:


• Yellow level 2 warning for damaging winds and waves resulting in difficulty in navigation at sea and localised disruptions to small harbours and ports, is expected between Alexander Bay and Plettenberg Bay persisting until Thursday.

• Yellow level 2 warning for damaging winds resulting in difficulty in navigation at sea is expected between Cape Agulhas and Plettenberg Bay today.


> Expected temperatures on Wednesday:


‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
